settings.heading: When you know better, you choose better.
settings.text: The story of a microbiologist who turned a habit of reading labels into a brand built entirely on the truth of what's inside.

settings.quote: "Divine Ingredients began, as many good things do, with a simple habit. Turning the label over and asking, 'but what's really in this?'"

settings.text:
For me, that question wasn't fleeting curiosity. With a background in microbiology and quality control, I knew exactly what to look for, and more importantly, what didn't belong.

So I set a new standard. One rooted in honesty, not marketing. Every ingredient at Divine is sourced with intention, tested with rigour, and chosen because it earns its place, not because it sounds good on a label. No filters, no shortcuts. Just what nature meant, thoughtfully refined.

Because when you know better, you choose better. And once you taste the difference, there's no going back.
settings.card_1_desc: Quality control expertise. She knows exactly what belongs, and what doesn't.
settings.card_2_desc: Not marketing. Not buzzwords. What's on the label is exactly what's inside.

settings.heading: Our values
settings.value_1_body: We don't dress up mediocre ingredients with clever language. What's on the label is exactly what's in the bag. Nothing more, nothing less. That's not a promise. It's a standard we built the entire company around.
settings.value_2_body: Every batch is independently tested by a third-party lab before it ships. USDA Organic, CCOF Certified, Non-GMO. These aren't badges we collect. They're the minimum we accept before anything leaves the warehouse.
settings.value_3_body: We go directly to the farms. Japan, India, Sri Lanka, and beyond. We build real relationships with the people who grow what you consume. No brokers. No mystery. Full traceability, every time.

settings.heading: Every claim, verified.
settings.cert_1_body: Certified to the highest US organic standards. Audited, verified, and renewed annually.
settings.cert_2_body: California Certified Organic Farmers. One of the most rigorous organic certifications in North America.
settings.cert_3_body: Third-party independent testing for purity, potency, and safety. Certificate of Analysis available on request.
settings.cert_4_body: Sourced responsibly, from farms that treat people and land with the same care we put into every product.

settings.heading:
Taste the
difference honesty makes.
settings.text: 36 teas, 14 superfood powders, spices, and botanicals. All sourced with the same intention and tested to the same standard. Start exploring.
